# VZLA Sports Elite

> Daily eBay market data and investment signals for 550+ Venezuelan athletes' sports cards across baseball, soccer, football, MMA, golf, tennis, and more.

## Pages

- [/](/): Live market dashboard with athlete price tracking, stability scores, investment signals, and sparkline trends.
- [/about](/about): About VZLA Sports Elite, mission, and data sources.
- [/data](/data): Browse raw and graded eBay price data for all tracked Venezuelan athletes with filtering, CSV export, and average days listed.
- [/market-data](/market-data): Visualize market trends, top deals, sold comps, and scarcity analytics for Venezuelan sports cards.
- [/blog](/blog): Editorial blog posts on Venezuelan sports card collecting, athlete profiles, market analysis, and investment strategies.
- [/checklist-intel](/checklist-intel): 6-step tool to analyze a sports card set checklist and estimate implied print runs, SP/SSP odds, and investment potential.
- [/how-it-works](/how-it-works): Explanation of data pipeline, Taguchi-method pricing, stability scoring, and investment signal methodology.
- [/methodology](/methodology): Detailed methodology for data collection, price averaging, S/N ratio calculations, and market stability metrics.
- [/mlb-venezuelan-leaders](/mlb-venezuelan-leaders): Historical leaderboards and analysis of Venezuelan MLB players.
- [/blog/acuna-torres-tracker](/blog/acuna-torres-tracker): Ronald Acuña Jr. and Gleyber Torres rookie card tracker and price history.
- [/blog/venezuelan-sports-cards-market-cap](/blog/venezuelan-sports-cards-market-cap): Market capitalization analysis of the Venezuelan sports cards ecosystem.

## Optional

- [/privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy, cookie usage, and data handling practices.
